source_change: vmlx_engine/models/mllm.py renders MiMo enable_thinking=false through the native plain assistant prefix instead of the native closed <think></think> rail

long_false.after: RemoteDisconnected; server log ended with Metal OOM: kIOGPUCommandBufferCallbackErrorOutOfMemory

tool_false.after: not executed after long prompt because server process was gone

release_boundary: This does not release-clear MiMo. It fixes the closed-thinking prompt rail that caused empty cache output, but long-prompt OOM, exactness, tool proof, speed, source-vs-quant, and media remain open.
